$comment: Diffract universal tool registry. Each entry defines a third-party CLI the agent can use, across four layers. INSTALL fields (repo/ref/kind/patch/build/entry/bin) are consumed at image-build time by install-diffract-tools.sh to bake the tool into /sandbox/.diffract-tools/<name> and put <bin> on the agent PATH. CONNECT fields (secretEnv/configEnv/apiHosts/binaries/authHeader) are consumed at runtime by diffract-tool-connect.sh to wire the tool's credentials securely (OpenShell generic provider -> placeholder in sandbox -> real secret injected at egress; egress allowlisted to apiHosts, attributed to binaries). ADVERTISE fields (the optional 'skill' object: name/title/summary/tags/examples) are consumed at image-build time by advertise-diffract-tools.sh to emit a hermes SKILL.md under /sandbox/.hermes/skills/diffract-tools/<name>, so the agent DISCOVERS the tool in its skill catalog and knows it is pre-authenticated (install/connect make a tool runnable; advertise makes the agent aware of it). 'patch' is an optional shell command run after clone and before build, in the tool dir — use it for proxy-compat fixups (the sandbox routes egress through an MITM proxy; node tools must use undici/fetch, so an axios tool needs adapter:'fetch'). Add a tool = add an entry here; no Dockerfile edit.

tools.name: facebook
tools.description: Facebook & Instagram Graph API — read and reply to Page/Instagram comments and send DMs. Pre-authenticated via the operator's Facebook login; install-less (the agent calls the Graph API with curl).

skill.name: facebook
skill.title: Facebook & Instagram (Graph API)
skill.summary: Read and respond to Facebook Page and Instagram comments. Pre-authenticated: a Facebook Page token is injected. Call the Graph API with curl.
examples: # RULES (follow exactly to avoid wasted attempts):
# 1. $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN is ALWAYS set. NEVER echo/print/slice/inspect it (do NOT write
#    ${FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN:0:10}, do NOT echo it). Use it ONLY inside the -H header below.
# 2. Write ONE curl on ONE line, plain double quotes only. Copy the header verbatim.
# 3. UPPERCASE words (POST_ID, COMMENT_ID, ...) are placeholders: replace them with a REAL
#    id from a previous response. Never leave angle brackets or the word itself in the URL.
# Which page/IG do I manage? (a page token's /me IS the page)
curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/me?fields=id,name,instagram_business_account{id,username}"
# Latest posts:
curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/me/feed?fields=id,message,created_time&limit=5"
# Comments on a post (POST_ID from the call above):
curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/POST_ID/comments?fields=id,message,from"
# Reply to a comment:
curl -sS -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" --data-urlencode "message=Thanks for reaching out!" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/COMMENT_ID/comments"
# Instagram media (IG_USER_ID from the /me call above):
curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/IG_USER_ID/media?fields=id,caption,comments_count&limit=10"
# Comments on an IG media, then reply to one:
curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/IG_MEDIA_ID/comments?fields=id,text,username"
curl -sS -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" --data-urlencode "message=Thank you!" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/IG_COMMENT_ID/replies"
# LIVE AD comments (needs ads_read). Ad comments live on the ad's underlying post.
# Find ad accounts, then active ads + the post each runs, then read that post's comments
# and reply like any comment:
curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/me/adaccounts?fields=id,name"
curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/AD_ACCOUNT_ID/ads?fields=name,effective_status,creative{effective_object_story_id}&limit=25"
curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN" "https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0/OBJECT_STORY_ID/comments?fields=id,message,from"
